storyHook: 列清单进超市，挑菜问价，付款装袋回家
storyBlurb: 冰箱空了，朋友晚上要来吃饭。小李抓起购物袋冲向超市，得赶在中午前把菜备齐。
storyScript:
【开场】周六一早，小李翻开冰箱发现空空如也——晚上朋友要来家里吃饭，得赶紧去趟超市。他从抽屉里扯出一张便签纸，歪歪扭扭写下牛奶、面包、水果、鸡蛋、盐，叠好塞进口袋，拎起那只洗得发白的布袋子就出了门。走进街角那家开了十几年的小超市，推拉门哗地一响，收银台后面的王阿姨一抬头就笑了，老远就跟他打招呼，问他今天怎么来得这么早。小李说晚上有客人，得买一桌子菜回去。

【进行·挑菜问价】王阿姨从柜台后面探出身子，指点他今天什么新鲜。小李先到冷藏柜拿了一盒鲜牛奶，犹豫了一下又多拿了一盒，想着可以煮个奶油蘑菇汤。接着去面包架上挑了一袋切片吐司，捏了捏确认是软的。水果区他本来想买苹果，但看到一筐红得发亮的草莓，忍不住问王阿姨多少钱一斤，听到价格觉得还行就装了一盒。鸡蛋他小心翼翼地挑了十个，一个个翻过来检查底部有没有裂的。最后差点忘了盐，在调料货架转了一圈才找到，顺手又拿了一瓶酱油。王阿姨在旁边逗他，说你这是要开饭店啊。

【进行·付款装袋】东西堆到收银台上，王阿姨一样一样扫码报价，小李掏出手机准备扫码付款。王阿姨把总价报出来，小李愣了一下觉得比预想的便宜，王阿姨笑着说今天鸡蛋搞活动打了八折。小李开心地扫了码，然后把东西一样样往布袋子里装，鸡蛋放最上面怕压碎，牛奶竖着卡在角落里。王阿姨还多塞给他两根葱，说炖汤放点葱花香。

【收束】小李拎着沉甸甸的布袋子道了谢，说下次再来。推开门走进阳光里，心里盘算着回去先把鸡蛋和牛奶放冰箱，然后洗菜切菜，赶在朋友到之前炖一锅热汤。布袋子在腿边一晃一晃，他脚步轻快地往家走去。

narrative.when: 周六早上九点，朋友晚上要来家里吃饭
narrative.where: 家附近社区超市，生鲜区与收银台
narrative.who: 甲（王阿姨，超市理货员）· 乙（小李，上班族）
narrative.how: 拿着手写买菜清单，步行到店，自带布袋子
narrative.method: 按清单挑菜、问新鲜度和价格、称重、扫码付钱、分袋装好
narrative.event: 家里牛奶喝完了，晚饭要做蔬菜汤，得在中午前把食材买齐回家

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Morning! You are early today.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Morning. Friends are coming for dinner tonight — need to be home before twelve.
turns.zh: 早上好，晚上有朋友来吃饭，中午前得回去备菜。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me guess — the fridge at home is empty again.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That bad?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You come in every Saturday with that same face.
turns.zh: 你每个周六进来都是这副表情。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I made a list this time. Milk, bread, eggs, salt...
turns.zh: 我这次列了单子。牛奶、面包、鸡蛋、盐……

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You forgot the fruit.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I was getting to that.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The milk came in fresh this morning — back shelf.
turns.zh: 牛奶今早刚到，很新鲜，在后面那排。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will take two.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Two? You opening a tea house?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I want to make a thick white soup with the mushrooms.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good call. The round plants are just past the bread shelf.
turns.zh: 好主意，蘑菇就在面包架旁边。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will swing by there. Thank you.
turns.zh: 我去那边看看，谢谢阿姨。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This bag of bread — is it the soft kind?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Fresh today. I pressed it this morning — still gives.
turns.zh: 今天新鲜的，我早上按过，软乎的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One bag, then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The strawberry came in this morning too. Want a look?
turns.zh: 草莓今早也到了，要看看吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: strawberry? That was not on my list.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: New season. Very sweet this time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How much for a box?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Three fifty. That is a cheap price.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will take one. My friend loves these.
turns.zh: 拿一盒，我朋友喜欢吃这个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now for eggs. I keep the good ones in the front row.
turns.zh: 去拿鸡蛋吧，好的我都放前排。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I need ten. Let me check each one.
turns.zh: 我要十个，得一个个看看有没有裂的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No broken ones in this tray. I checked this morning.
turns.zh: 这盘里没有裂的，我早上检查过了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You check every morning?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Someone has to.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: These look good. All ten.
turns.zh: 这几个不错，就这十个了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And eggs are on offer today — twenty off.
turns.zh: 今天鸡蛋搞活动，打八折。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Really? I came on the right day.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Salt next. Third way, middle shelf.
turns.zh: 接下来拿盐，三号通道中间那层。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, salt.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh — dark sauce too. Almost let it go.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Same way. It is right next to the salt.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Saves me a trip. Good.
turns.zh: 省得再跑一趟了，太好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Got both.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Quick. You knew where to go.
turns.zh: 动作挺快的，知道在哪里拿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You told me once. I kept it.
turns.zh: 您上次告诉我的，我记住了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The round plants — did you get them?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Third way, cold part on the left.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Back in a second.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: These look good — firm and dry.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good ones for soup. Not soft, not wet.
turns.zh: 做汤就要选这种，不软不湿。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Am I missing anything else?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us see — milk, bread, red fruit, eggs, salt, dark sauce, round plants.
turns.zh: 我数一下——牛奶、面包、草莓、鸡蛋、盐、酱油、蘑菇。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is everything. Wait — green onions. For the soup.
turns.zh: 都齐了。等等——葱，放汤里的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Plant part — small green ones or the big ones?
turns.zh: 要哪种葱，小葱还是大葱？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Small green ones.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Over there. Two groups should be enough.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: These smell very fresh.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The delivery just came. Shall we go to the counter?
turns.zh: 刚送到的。好，去结账了吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I think I have everything now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Milk — two boxes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Bread — one bag. strawberry — one box.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Eggs — ten. Salt, dark sauce — check.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Round plants — one bag. green onions — two.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: With the egg offer... thirty two fifty all together.
turns.zh: 算上鸡蛋折扣……一共三十二块五。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That cost less than I thought.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The eggs bring it down. Good day to come in.
turns.zh: 鸡蛋折扣帮了大忙，今天来对了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will pay with my phone.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The machine is on the right.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All paid. Now let us put things in the bag.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Eggs on top — they go to bits so quick.
turns.zh: 鸡蛋放最上面，它们太容易碎了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I know. I have been putting eggs in bags for thirty years.
turns.zh: 我知道，我装鸡蛋装了三十年了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Sorry. Of course you do.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Milk goes in the corner — keeps it from rolling.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Smart.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Bread on the side. Do not press it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It was already a bit flat on the shelf.
turns.zh: 在架子上就有点压扁了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It will come back. Warm bag.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have a word for everything.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thirty years.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The dark sauce — heavy. Goes at the bottom?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Salt too. Heavy things go below.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now I know how to do it next time.
turns.zh: 下次我就知道怎么装了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You always put the eggs at the bottom before.
turns.zh: 你以前每次都把鸡蛋放底下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And every time one broke.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here. Nice and heavy.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. This will make a good meal.
turns.zh: 谢谢阿姨，这一顿肯定好吃。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Wait —

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take these two green onions. Free. For your soup.
turns.zh: 拿着这两根葱，送的，放汤里用。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You do not need to do that.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is two green onions, not a gold ring.
turns.zh: 才两根葱，又不是金戒指。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then I will not say no. Thank you.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How many friends are coming tonight?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Three. Should be enough food.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Three people and two boxes of milk. Quite enough.
turns.zh: 三个人，两盒牛奶，肯定够了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One box is for the morning. I am not that open with my things.
turns.zh: 一盒是明天早上喝的，我没那么大方。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Go home and cook. Your friends will thank you.
turns.zh: 快回去做饭吧，朋友们会谢谢你的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I hope so. The soup is the hard part.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Low heat. Put the green onions in at the very end.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will keep that in mind.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: okay next week.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Same time?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Maybe a bit later. I am not always this well ready.
turns.zh: 可能会晚点，我没每次都这么有准备。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You will come in looking lost again.
turns.zh: 你迟早又会一脸迷茫地进来的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Very likely. Thank you for everything today.
turns.zh: 很可能，今天谢谢您帮了那么多。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You found the round plants yourself this time.
turns.zh: 这次蘑菇是你自己找到的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Barely.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One step at a time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The soup will be good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Tell your friends they are welcome here.
turns.zh: 跟朋友说欢迎来买东西。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. They need food too.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Next Saturday then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Goodbye.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Enjoy the meal.
